name: edge-agents
description: Repo-local Codex plugin for Edge lifecycle, review, export, maintenance, and ChatGPT-app workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Bounded lifecycle, review, export, maintenance, and ChatGPT-app workflows for Edge.
interface.longDescription: Project-local Codex plugin for Edge. It wraps the repo's canonical edge CLI, make lifecycle targets, proposal inspection modules, export surfaces, and edge-chatgpt-app helpers with reusable Codex skills, maintenance routing, run-review helpers, developer wrappers, and guardrail hooks.
defaultPrompt: Explain and plan a bounded proposal using the Edge lifecycle workflow.
Export one explicit thesis batch from a run and inspect its deployment state.
Route a repo change through the right validation and generated-doc maintenance loop.
Inspect or develop the Edge ChatGPT app surface without bypassing canonical operator flows.
Diagnose an Edge run and decide keep, modify, or kill.
